MonsterMission.name: Getting rid of Bomb Sharks
MonsterMission.description: A pack of Bomb Sharks has been terrorizing vessels traveling between [location1] and [location2]. A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to any crew that can neutralize it.
MonsterMission.successmessage: The Bomb Sharks have been terminated.

message.text: The Bomb Sharks have been killed. Navigate the submarine out of the cavern to claim the reward.

MonsterMission.name: Getting rid of Bomb Sharks
MonsterMission.description: A pack of Bomb Sharks has been terrorizing vessels traveling between [location1] and [location2]. A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to any crew that can neutralize it.
MonsterMission.successmessage: The Bomb Sharks have been terminated.

message.text: The Bomb Sharks have been killed. Navigate the submarine out of the cavern to claim the reward.

MonsterMission.name: Getting rid of Bomb Sharks
MonsterMission.description: A pack of Bomb Sharks has been terrorizing vessels traveling between [location1] and [location2]. A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to any crew that can neutralize it.
MonsterMission.successmessage: The Bomb Sharks have been terminated.

message.text: The Bomb Sharks have been killed. Navigate the submarine out of the cavern to claim the reward.

MonsterMission.name: Getting rid of Bomb Sharks
MonsterMission.description: A pack of Bomb Sharks has been terrorizing vessels traveling between [location1] and [location2]. A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to any crew that can neutralize it.
MonsterMission.successmessage: The Bomb Sharks have been terminated.

message.text: The Bomb Sharks have been killed. Navigate the submarine out of the cavern to claim the reward.

MonsterMission.name: Getting rid of Bomb Sharks
MonsterMission.description: A pack of Bomb Sharks has been terrorizing vessels traveling between [location1] and [location2]. A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to any crew that can neutralize it.
MonsterMission.successmessage: The Bomb Sharks have been terminated.

message.text: The Bomb Sharks have been killed. Navigate the submarine out of the cavern to claim the reward.

MonsterMission.name: Getting rid of Sea Urchins!
MonsterMission.description: A pack of Sea Urchins led by a queen has been terrorizing vessels traveling between [location1] and [location2]. A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to any crew that can neutralize it.
MonsterMission.successmessage: The Sea Urchins have been terminated.

message.text: The Sea Urchins have been killed. Navigate the submarine out of the cavern to claim the reward.

MonsterMission.name: Getting rid of Sea Urchins!
MonsterMission.description: A pack of Sea Urchins led by a queen has been terrorizing vessels traveling between [location1] and [location2]. A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to any crew that can neutralize it.
MonsterMission.successmessage: The Sea Urchins have been terminated.

message.text: The Sea Urchins have been killed. Navigate the submarine out of the cavern to claim the reward.

MonsterMission.name: Getting rid of Sea Urchins!
MonsterMission.description: A pack of Sea Urchins led by a queen has been terrorizing vessels traveling between [location1] and [location2]. A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to any crew that can neutralize it.
MonsterMission.successmessage: The Sea Urchins have been terminated.

message.text: The Sea Urchins have been killed. Navigate the submarine out of the cavern to claim the reward.

MonsterMission.name: Terminate a Chun swarm
MonsterMission.description: There have been several reports of a large swarm of Chuns assaulting vessels traveling between [location1] and [location2]. A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to any crew who can get rid of them.

message.text: The Chun swarm is terminated. Navigate the submarine out of the cavern to claim the reward.

MonsterMission.name: Terminate a Chun swarm
MonsterMission.description: There have been several reports of a large swarm of Chuns assaulting vessels traveling between [location1] and [location2]. A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to any crew who can get rid of them.

message.text: The Chun swarm is terminated. Navigate the submarine out of the cavern to claim the reward.

MonsterMission.name: Terminate a Chun swarm
MonsterMission.description: There have been several reports of a large swarm of Chuns assaulting vessels traveling between [location1] and [location2]. A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to any crew who can get rid of them.

message.text: The Chun swarm is terminated. Navigate the submarine out of the cavern to claim the reward.

MonsterMission.name: Hidden Venomous Eels
MonsterMission.description: Some divers have discovered traces of Venomous eels in nearby caves between [location1] and [location2]. Getting rid of these creatures will greatly improve the diver's survival rate.
MonsterMission.successmessage: The Venomous eels has been killed.

message.text: The Venomous eels are terminated. Navigate the submarine out of the cavern to claim the reward.

MonsterMission.name: Hidden Venomous Eels
MonsterMission.description: Some divers have discovered traces of Venomous eels in nearby caves between [location1] and [location2]. Getting rid of these creatures will greatly improve the diver's survival rate.
MonsterMission.successmessage: The Venomous eels has been killed.

message.text: The Venomous eels are terminated. Navigate the submarine out of the cavern to claim the reward.

MonsterMission.name: End its misery
MonsterMission.description: According to related reports, a Moloch parasitized by the thalamus is wandering around, attacking vessels traveling between [location1] and [location2]. End its misery, a reward of [reward] marks has been promised to those who kill the creature.
MonsterMission.successmessage: The Blight Moloch has been killed.

message.text: The Blight Moloch is dead. Navigate the submarine out of the cavern to claim the reward.

MonsterMission.name: The Three Molochs
MonsterMission.description: According to related reports, three Molochs are wandering around, attacking vessels traveling between [location1] and [location2]. Destroy them! A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to those who kill the creatures.

message.text: The Molochs are dead. Navigate the submarine out of the cavern to claim the reward.

MonsterMission.name: Traces of the mysterious Spineling
MonsterMission.description: Some researchers have traced a source of high-energy radiation between [location1] and [location2], it turns out to be a mysterious spineling. A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to whoever brings the creature's sample to them.
MonsterMission.successmessage: The mysterious spineling have been killed.

message.text: The mysterious Spineling is dead. Navigate the submarine out of the cavern to claim the reward.

MonsterMission.name: missionname.salvagekillmoloch
MonsterMission.description: Researchers of [location1] have picked up an radiation signal highly similar to those emitted by alien artifacts previously discovered on Europa. Investigate the signal and retrieve the potential artifact.
MonsterMission.successmessage: It turns out the signal was emitted by some massive spinelings. The researchers of [location1] have agreed to pay you the reward of [reward] marks nevertheless for getting rid of the problem.

message.text: Turns out the signal was emitted by some massive spinelings! You should navigate out of the cavern and inform the researchers.

BeaconMission.name: Activate Beacon
BeaconMission.description: The beacon station between [location1] and [location2] is down - get in there and get it back online and transmitting an active sonar signal.

message.text: The beacon station is back online. Make sure it stays transmitting, and navigate the submarine to [location2] to claim your reward.

BeaconMission.name: Activate Beacon
BeaconMission.description: The beacon station between [location1] and [location2] is down - get in there and get it back online and transmitting an active sonar signal.

message.text: The beacon station is back online. Make sure it stays transmitting, and navigate the submarine to [location2] to claim your reward.

NestMission.name: Destroy a Sea Urchin nest
NestMission.description: A sea urchin nest was recently discovered in a cave near [location1]. A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to any crew that can get rid of the nest.

NestMission.name: Destroy a Sea Urchin nest
NestMission.description: A sea urchin nest was recently discovered in a cave near [location1]. A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to any crew that can get rid of the nest.

NestMission.name: Destroy a Bombshark nest
NestMission.description: A bombshark nest was recently discovered in a cave near [location1]. A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to any crew that can get rid of the nest.

NestMission.name: Destroy a Bombshark nest
NestMission.description: A bombshark nest was recently discovered in a cave near [location1]. A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to any crew that can get rid of the nest.

NestMission.name: Destroy a Chun nest
NestMission.description: A Chun nest was recently discovered in a cave near [location1]. A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to any crew that can get rid of the nest. Chun's attack paralyzing its target, so remember to bring some Anaparalyzants!

NestMission.name: Destroy a Chun nest
NestMission.description: A Chun nest was recently discovered in a cave near [location1]. A reward of [reward] marks has been promised to any crew that can get rid of the nest. Chun's attack paralyzing its target, so remember to bring some Anaparalyzants!

AlienRuinClearMission.name: missionname.clearruin
AlienRuinClearMission.description: Local residents complained that monsters kept appearing in the ruins near [location1], which being a major threat to the outpost. Destroy all of them and the incubation bubbles there.
AlienRuinClearMission.successmessage: Ruin creatures have been wiped out.

message.text: Ruin creatures have been wiped out. Navigate the submarine out of the cavern to claim the reward.

AlienRuinClearMission.name: missionname.clearruin
AlienRuinClearMission.description: Local residents complained that monsters kept appearing in the ruins near [location1], which being a major threat to the outpost. Destroy all of them and the incubation bubbles there.
AlienRuinClearMission.successmessage: Ruin creatures have been wiped out.

message.text: Ruin creatures have been wiped out. Navigate the submarine out of the cavern to claim the reward.
